_meta.scope: Residential private stairs — OBC Division B, 9.8.4 & 9.8.5
_meta._note: Values reflect the 2024 OBC update. All limits in millimeters; convert to inches on display. This file is versioned so updates don't require code changes.

rise.message_en: Stair rise must be between 125mm (4.92 in) and 200mm (7.87 in).
rise.message_pt: Altura do espelho deve estar entre 125mm (4.92 in) e 200mm (7.87 in).

run.message_en: Tread run must be at least 255mm (10 in) and no more than 355mm (14 in).
run.message_pt: Profundidade do piso deve ser entre 255mm (10 in) e 355mm (14 in).

nosing.message_en: Tread nosing projection cannot exceed 25mm (1 in).
nosing.message_pt: Saliência do piso não pode passar de 25mm (1 in).

headroom.message_en: Headroom must be at least 1950mm (77 in) above the leading edge of the tread.
headroom.message_pt: Pé-direito sobre a escada deve ser no mínimo 1950mm (77 in).

uniformity.message_en: Successive risers and treads must be uniform within 5mm.
uniformity.message_pt: Espelhos e pisos consecutivos não podem variar mais de 5mm.
